subject: export micrograph list for Relion's polishing
body:
Dear All,

When I tried to export micrographs list for Relion polishing, there was no 
check box for the option "Generate files for RELION's polishing" to select, 
I'm using version 1.0.5,
dose it not having this option? If so, which version should I update to?

Beside, warp 1.0.7 on our machine tends to crash when attempted to pick 
particles, something went wrong when loading picking model. While our IT 
colleagues are working on it, it could be our hardware has some issue, as 
after shifting back to version 1.0.5, particle picking caused another 
failure. 
I mentioned it as if it is a function available from version 1.0.7, I would 
have to wait.

Many thanks for your help.
Best regards,

Yingyi
